### School Overview

- The school name is "Mergington High School".
- It is a public high school in Mergington, Florida.
- The school motto is "Branch out and grow".
- It serves grades 9 through 12.

## Development Environment

For detailed setup and development instructions, please refer to our [Development Guide](../docs/how-to-develop.md).

### User Interaction

Consider the following when communicating with the staff.

- The staff is not technical. Explain in simple terms and avoid software jargon.
- Any new code must be easy to maintain and understand without significant coding experience.

## Program architecture

- The website users are students and teachers. Keep the user experience simple.
- Do not make additional apps or services.
- Do not make command line tools.
- Do not create a long single-file application. Use an easy-to-understand directory structure.
- Only use HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python.
